articles.title: Marathon's Big Free Season 2 Debut Plagued By Server Issues
articles.description: Bungie's Marathon suffers major server outages on its significant update day. Players are struggling to access the game since its launch.
articles.impact: Server problems hinder player experience significantly.

articles.title: Google Is Quietly Buying Code From Play Store Developers to Train AI
articles.description: Google is discreetly purchasing code from Android developers to enhance its AI capabilities. This initiative is part of a confidential program aimed at improving AI tools.
articles.impact: Google's strategy may reshape AI development.

articles.title: Mina The Hollower Sold 300,000 Copies In Three Days
articles.description: Yacht Club Games' Mina the Hollower sold 300,000 copies in just three days, becoming the highest-rated game of 2026. This success helps the studio avoid a critical moment.
articles.impact: Strong sales boost Yacht Club's future prospects.

articles.title: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ with Intel Arc G3 Extreme listed at Best Buy for $1,699
articles.description: The MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ is now available at Best Buy for $1,699, exceeding initial price expectations. This handheld features Intel's Arc G3 Extreme graphics.
articles.impact: MSI's pricing strategy may affect sales.

articles.title: Meet Microsoft Scout, Your AI Coworker That Never Logs Off
articles.description: Microsoft introduces Scout, an AI agent for Teams that automates mundane tasks. This always-on assistant aims to enhance workplace productivity.

articles.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
articles.description: Google launches a fake call detection feature to combat AI deepfake scams. This tool aims to protect users from impersonation threats.
articles.impact: This feature enhances user security significantly.

articles.title: iPhone Ultra might have tech innovation over 15 years in the making
articles.description: The upcoming iPhone Ultra may feature liquid metal technology, a significant innovation from Apple. This device is set to launch this fall.
articles.impact: This innovation could redefine smartphone design.

articles.title: Get Another Look At Star Fox On Switch 2 In New Overview Trailer
articles.description: Nintendo releases a new overview trailer for the upcoming Star Fox on Switch 2. The trailer highlights exciting features and gameplay.
articles.impact: Anticipation for Star Fox continues to grow.
